name: Pool Night Lounging Portrait
description: Woman lying on stomach by pool or hot tub at night, pink bikini with orange accents, relaxed intimate low-light ambiance
input_prompt: woman lounging by pool at night pink bikini lying on stomach low light

subject.description: young adult woman with light brown to dark blonde long hair, light skin tone, lying on stomach with upper body propped on forearms

hair.style: loose, slightly damp or sleek, parted near center

face.features: soft facial features, relaxed eyes, natural lips
face.expression: relaxed, soft neutral gaze toward camera
face.makeup: subtle makeup with visible blush and defined eyelashes

accessories: small wrist tattoo on left arm
manicured nails with light pink polish

pose_action.position: lying on stomach with upper body propped on forearms
pose_action.camera_relation: slightly elevated and angled from side, medium-full body shot
pose_action.dynamic_elements: body_position: upper body resting on tiled edge, lower body near or partially over water; legs: extended behind; aesthetic: relaxed lounging pose

environment.location: outdoor or semi-outdoor pool or hot tub area at night
background: soft light sources reflected in background
dark tiled pool or hot tub edge

materials_textures.tiles: small square dark tiles with glossy finish

camera_technical.angle: slightly elevated and angled from side

color_palette.background: dark neutrals from tiles and background

realism_anchors: natural skin texture in low light

ideogram.prompt: Young woman with long light brown hair lounging by pool at night, wearing pink bikini with orange accents, lying on stomach propped on forearms on dark glossy tiles, soft low ambient lighting with warm highlights, water reflections, relaxed intimate atmosphere

recraft.prompt: Woman lounging by pool at night, pink orange bikini, lying on dark tiles, low ambient lighting, water reflections, intimate mood

luma.prompt: Nighttime pool scene, woman lounges peacefully on tile edge, warm lights reflect off water creating gentle ripples, soft ambient glow, tranquil evening atmosphere
luma.motion_notes: Subtle water ripples, soft breathing movement, ambient light flicker

reve.prompt: Intimate lifestyle photography in the style of low-light pool portraits, woman in pink bikini lounging at night, dark tiles water reflections, soft warm ambient lighting

grok-imagine.prompt: Woman with long brown hair lounging by pool at night, pink bikini with orange accents, lying on stomach on dark glossy tiles, low ambient lighting warm highlights, water reflections, relaxed intimate mood

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A young woman with light brown to dark blonde long hair lies on her stomach by a pool or hot tub at night, propped on her forearms on dark glossy tiles. She wears a pink triangle bikini top with orange accents and thin straps, paired with pink tie-side bikini bottoms with orange side ties. Her hair is loose, slightly damp, and parted near the center. She has a small wrist tattoo on her left arm and light pink manicured nails. Her expression is relaxed with a soft neutral gaze toward the camera, with subtle makeup showing blush and defined lashes. The setting is an outdoor or semi-outdoor pool area at night with a dark wall or fence in the background, soft light sources reflected, and gentle water ripples. The lighting is low and ambient with soft warm highlights on her skin and dim shadows. The mood is calm, relaxed, and intimate. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic skin texture with natural low-light appearance.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman lying on stomach by nighttime pool, propped on forearms on dark glossy tiles, wearing pink bikini with orange accents, long light brown hair slightly damp, relaxed soft gaze at camera, low ambient lighting with warm highlights on skin, water ripples and reflections visible, intimate poolside atmosphere, lifestyle photography, natural skin texture, not overly smoothed or cartoon-like
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A young woman with long light brown hair lounges by a pool at night, lying on her stomach with upper body propped on forearms on dark glossy tiles. She wears a pink triangle bikini with orange accents. The scene has low ambient lighting with soft warm highlights on her skin, water ripples creating gentle reflections in the background. Her expression is calm and relaxed with a soft neutral gaze. The atmosphere is intimate and peaceful with a dark wall or fence visible behind her.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the bikini color to blue while keeping the pose, lighting, and poolside setting the same. Preserve the nighttime atmosphere and warm skin highlights.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed bikini colors (pink with orange accents, orange ties), specific accessories (wrist tattoo, pink nails)
2_realism_anchors: 'glossy tile reflections', 'water ripples', 'damp hair texture', 'visible tattoo detail'
3_technical_camera: 'slightly elevated angle from side', 'medium-full body horizontal', 'low-light ambiance'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents bright daylight, harsh lighting, overexposed
5_spatial_consistency: clear pose (stomach, forearms, legs extended, near water edge)
6_lighting_storytelling: 'low ambient soft warm highlights' = calm intimate nighttime mood
7_material_specificity: tile finish (glossy), water quality (clear with reflections), fabric (stretchy)
